Url.description: URL to download the resource from, supports .yaml/.yml files or .zip or .tar.gz archives.

ArchivePathRegex.description: Regex Filter for Archive Path when extracting from archive (zip, tar.gz, etc.)

Repo.description: GitHub Repository in the format of "owner/repo"

ReleaseNameRegex.description: Regex Filter for Release Name when selecting releases from a GitHub repository.

AssetNameRegex.description: Regex Filter for Asset Name when selecting assets from a GitHub release.

ArchivePathRegex.description: Regex Filter for Archive Path when extracting from archive (zip, tar.gz, etc.)

PreRelease.description: Whether to include pre-release versions when selecting the latest release. If true, pre-release versions will be considered; if false, only stable versions will be considered. If null, the default behavior is to exclude pre-release versions.

Repo.description: Helm Repository URL (e.g., "https://myrepo.com/charts") or OCI Registry URL (e.g., "oci://myregistry.com/myrepo")

PreRelease.description: Whether to include pre-release versions when selecting the latest release. If true, pre-release versions will be considered; if false, only stable versions will be considered. If null, the default behavior is to exclude pre-release versions.

AppendArgs.description: Custom arguments to append to the Helm Template command.

PreRelease.description: Whether to include pre-release versions when selecting the latest tag. If true, pre-release versions will be considered; if false, only stable versions will be considered. If null, the default behavior is to exclude pre-release versions.
